channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Signals Possible De-escalation Amid Continued Strikes and Leadership Uncertainty
item.description: The conflict between Iran and its Gulf neighbors intensified even as Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian delivered what appeared to be the country's first statement hinting at de-escalation. Pezeshkia...

item.title: US Foreign Policy and Escalating Conflicts in West Asia and Beyond
item.description: The article critically examines the United States’ approach to foreign policy under President Donald Trump, arguing that the US has a long-standing pattern of initiating foreign conflicts when facing ...

item.title: Australian Paralympian Josh Hanlon Injured During Alpine Skiing Event at Cortina 2026
item.description: Australian para-alpine skier Josh Hanlon had a tough start at the 2026 Winter Paralympics in Cortina. During his first event, the men's alpine downhill sitting race, Hanlon lost control on a challengi...

item.title: Iran-US-Israel War Enters Second Week Amid Regional Tensions

item.title: Jorrybell Agoto: From Theater to International Film Success with ‘Filipiñana’
item.description: Jorrybell Agoto, a 31-year-old Filipina actress, has steadily risen in the international film scene, with her breakthrough coming from Rafael Manuel’s short film ‘Filipiñana,’ which later evolved into...

item.title: President Murmu Questions Venue Change and Attendance at Santhal Conference in West Bengal
item.description: On Saturday, President Droupadi Murmu expressed her concern regarding the venue of the 9th International Santhal Conference in West Bengal. Originally scheduled for Phansidewa, the programme was later...

item.title: Trends in violence against women and girls in England and Wales: progress, persistent challenges, and emerging forms of abuse
item.description: Violence against women and girls remains a major issue in England and Wales, representing nearly 20% of all recorded crime and exceeding one million incidents annually, with at least one in twelve wom...

item.title: Rare MET Gene Mutation Identified as a Direct Cause of Fatty Liver Disease
item.description: Researchers at Mayo Clinic have discovered a rare mutation in the MET gene that can directly lead to metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease, formerly known as nonalcoholic fatty live...

item.title: DRC and Rwanda send representatives to 25th EAC Summit in Arusha
item.description: The 25th Ordinary Summit of the East African Community (EAC) kicked off in Arusha, but Presidents Paul Kagame of Rwanda and Félix Tshisekedi of the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) were not present....

item.title: Hurricanes Defeat Oilers 6-3 with Strong Offensive Performance
item.description: In a high-scoring NHL matchup in Edmonton, the Carolina Hurricanes continued their impressive run with a 6-3 victory over the Edmonton Oilers on Friday. Jackson Blake led the Hurricanes offensively, s...

item.title: The Palisadian-Post Newspaper to Relaunch Under New Ownership Following Fire Recovery Efforts
item.description: The nearly century-old Palisadian-Post newspaper in Pacific Palisades, California, is set to relaunch in May under new owners Laura and Tim Schneider after closing due to the devastating Palisades fir...

item.title: Toyota Gazoo Racing Targets Sixth Consecutive WRC Safari Rally Victory with Juha Kankkunen
item.description: Legendary Finnish rally driver Juha Kankkunen, now serving as deputy team principal for Toyota Gazoo Racing, has affirmed the team's strong resolve to clinch a sixth consecutive victory at the WRC Saf...

item.title: Patients Affected by Mould and Water Issues at Queen Elizabeth University Hospital
item.description: The Queen Elizabeth University Hospital in Glasgow, which opened in 2015, is facing renewed scrutiny after a recent incident involving mould and water ingress in its adult bone marrow transplant ward,...

item.title: Oscar Sudi Clears Outstanding Ksh 350k to Help Nick Kosgei's Family Secure Land for Burial

item.title: Rappler Hosts AMA with Navy Spokesperson on Chinese Espionage Cases in the Philippines
item.description: Rappler is set to hold an Ask Me Anything (AMA) session on March 10, 2026, at 2 pm via its app's Security and Global Affairs chat room. The featured guest is Philippine Navy Spokesperson Rear Admiral ...

item.title: Former SANDF soldier charged with murder of wife at Durban restaurant
item.description: Fredrik le Roux, a former South African National Defence Force special forces soldier, is facing charges of premeditated murder following the killing of his wife, Taryn le Roux, at Waxy’s restaurant i...

item.title: Western Bulldogs defeat Brisbane Lions in tight Gabba clash amid Andrews’ MRO review
item.description: The Western Bulldogs pulled off a thrilling win over reigning premiers Brisbane Lions at the Gabba, showcasing their potential as a premiership contender despite missing finals last season. The match ...

item.title: Zanzibar hosts large communal Iftar at Amani Stadium to celebrate Ramadan
item.description: Today, Zanzibar is hosting a large communal Iftar at Amani Stadium, expected to attract around 15,000 people including national leaders, locals, and visitors. The event aims not only to celebrate the ...

item.title: Political Thugs Attack Wike Faction Congresses Across Oyo State
item.description: For Saturday, Oyo State PDP wahala don increase as political thugs storm local government congresses wey dey backed by Minister of FCT, Nyesom Wike. The attacks happen for different areas like Ibadan ...
